## Description

Short description of the feature.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Scope

- What is included
- What is NOT included (important to avoid scope creep)

## Requirements

- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2

## API / Data Contract (if applicable)

```json
{
  "request": {},
  "response": {}
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] No breaking existing functionality

## Notes

Anything important for dev (edge cases, assumptions, etc.)
